# baseui-cn

> A styled component registry built on Base UI primitives with a one-command install experience.
> All components use @base-ui/react (v1.3.0+) as the exclusive primitive layer.
> Tailwind CSS v4 for styling. No other UI library dependencies.

## Related documentation

For the full Base UI primitive API — props, data attributes, render prop pattern, composition,
animation, and styling guides — see the official Base UI documentation:

  https://base-ui.com/llms.txt

Key Base UI concepts every agent must understand:

- render prop (not asChild): https://base-ui.com/react/handbook/composition.md
- Styling with data attributes: https://base-ui.com/react/handbook/styling.md
- Animation with data-[open] / data-[closed]: https://base-ui.com/react/handbook/animation.md
- TypeScript usage: https://base-ui.com/react/handbook/typescript.md

## What baseui-cn is

baseui-cn provides Tailwind-styled wrappers around Base UI primitives, delivered through
a registry with a one-command install. Components are copied into your project — you own
the code and can edit it freely.

The registry is intentionally focused: one primitive library (Base UI), one styling system
(Tailwind CSS v4), one command to install. No library mixing, no portal conflicts.

## Critical: render prop pattern

Base UI does NOT use the asChild pattern from Radix UI.
Base UI uses a render prop on Trigger, Close, and similar sub-components.

WRONG (Radix/shadcn pattern — do not use):
  <DialogTrigger asChild>
    <Button>Open</Button>
  </DialogTrigger>

CORRECT (Base UI pattern — always use this):
  <DialogTrigger render={<Button variant="outline">Open</Button>} />

This applies to ALL trigger and close sub-components:
  DialogTrigger, DialogClose
  DrawerTrigger, DrawerClose
  PopoverTrigger, PopoverClose
  TooltipTrigger
  DropdownMenuTrigger
  AlertDialogTrigger, AlertDialogClose

The render prop passes all necessary ARIA attributes, event handlers, and refs
to whatever element you provide. See: https://base-ui.com/react/handbook/composition.md

## Install

```bash
npx baseui-cn init
```

Sets up: CSS custom properties · lib/utils.ts with cn() · installs
@base-ui/react · clsx · tailwind-merge · class-variance-authority
Creates baseui-cn.json config file.

## Add components

```bash
npx baseui-cn add button
npx baseui-cn add dialog drawer select combobox
npx baseui-cn add --all
npx baseui-cn add          # interactive picker
```

## Component import paths

All components live in components/ui/ after install:

```tsx
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button"
import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input"
import { Drawer, DrawerTrigger, DrawerContent, DrawerHeader, DrawerTitle, DrawerDescription, DrawerFooter, DrawerClose } from "@/components/ui/drawer"
import { Dialog, DialogTrigger, DialogContent, DialogHeader, DialogTitle, DialogDescription, DialogFooter, DialogClose } from "@/components/ui/dialog"
import { Select, SelectTrigger, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectGroup, SelectLabel } from "@/components/ui/select"
import { Combobox } from "@/components/ui/combobox"
import { Popover, PopoverTrigger, PopoverContent } from "@/components/ui/popover"
import { TooltipProvider, Tooltip, TooltipTrigger, TooltipContent } from "@/components/ui/tooltip"
import { DropdownMenu, DropdownMenuTrigger, DropdownMenuContent, DropdownMenuItem, DropdownMenuSeparator } from "@/components/ui/dropdown-menu"
import { Tabs, TabsList, TabsTrigger, TabsContent } from "@/components/ui/tabs"
import { Accordion, AccordionItem, AccordionTrigger, AccordionContent } from "@/components/ui/accordion"
import { Checkbox } from "@/components/ui/checkbox"
import { Switch } from "@/components/ui/switch"
import { RadioGroup, RadioGroupItem } from "@/components/ui/radio-group"
import { Toast, ToastProvider, useToast } from "@/components/ui/toast"
import { Command, CommandDialog } from "@/components/ui/command"
import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge"
import { Alert, AlertDescription, AlertTitle } from "@/components/ui/alert"
import { Form } from "@/components/ui/form"
import { Skeleton } from "@/components/ui/skeleton"
import { Separator } from "@/components/ui/separator"
import { Table, TableHeader, TableBody, TableHead, TableRow, TableCell } from "@/components/ui/table"
import { Breadcrumb, BreadcrumbList, BreadcrumbItem, BreadcrumbLink, BreadcrumbPage, BreadcrumbSeparator } from "@/components/ui/breadcrumb"
import { Pagination, PaginationContent, PaginationItem, PaginationLink, PaginationPrevious, PaginationNext } from "@/components/ui/pagination"
import { EmptyState } from "@/components/ui/blocks/empty-state"
import { LoginBlock, SignupBlock } from "@/components/ui/auth"
```

## Available components

### Primitives (no Base UI primitive — native HTML)
- button — cva variants: default · secondary · outline · ghost · destructive · link. Sizes: default · sm · lg · icon
- input — label · helperText · error props. Handles aria-invalid automatically
- textarea — label · helperText · error · autoResize props
- label — required prop adds red asterisk
- separator — orientation: "horizontal" | "vertical"
- badge — variants: default · primary · primary-outline · secondary · outline · ghost · destructive · success · success-outline · warning · warning-outline · info · info-outline
- alert — semantic inline feedback container with default and destructive variants
- skeleton — animate-pulse placeholder, accepts className for sizing

### Form (Base UI primitives)
- checkbox — Base UI Checkbox. Props: label · description. Supports indeterminate state
- switch — Base UI Switch. Props: label · description
- radio-group — Base UI RadioGroup + Radio. Components: RadioGroup (label prop) + RadioGroupItem (label · description props)
- form — Base UI Form wrapper. Use with Field and Button for submit handling and validation wiring
- select — Base UI Select. Components: Select · SelectTrigger (placeholder prop) · SelectContent · SelectItem · SelectGroup · SelectLabel · SelectSeparator
- combobox — Base UI Select + filter state. Props: options · value · onValueChange · placeholder · searchPlaceholder · emptyText · disabled · label · error

### Overlays (all Base UI — shared portal system, no z-index conflicts)
- dialog — Base UI Dialog. Uses render prop on DialogTrigger and DialogClose
- drawer — Base UI Drawer (stable v1.3.0). DrawerContent has side prop: "right" | "left" | "bottom" | "top". Uses render prop on DrawerTrigger and DrawerClose. Bottom/top drawers show drag handle automatically
- popover — Base UI Popover. PopoverContent props: side · align · showArrow. Uses render prop on PopoverTrigger
- tooltip — Base UI Tooltip. Wrap with TooltipProvider for instant switching. TooltipContent props: side · showArrow. Uses render prop on TooltipTrigger
- dropdown-menu — Base UI Menu. DropdownMenuItem has destructive prop. Supports CheckboxItem and RadioItem. Uses render prop on DropdownMenuTrigger
- toast — Base UI Toast. Wrap app with ToastProvider. Use useToast() hook, call add(). Toast props: title · description · variant (default · success · error · warning) · action
- command — Custom implementation (no cmdk). Command props: items · placeholder · emptyText · onSelect. CommandDialog wraps in Base UI Dialog. Items have: id · label · description · icon · shortcut · group · onSelect · disabled

### Navigation & Data (native HTML)
- tabs — Base UI Tabs. Components: Tabs · TabsList · TabsTrigger · TabsContent
- accordion — Base UI Accordion. Components: Accordion · AccordionItem · AccordionTrigger · AccordionContent
- table — Native table. Components: Table · TableHeader · TableBody · TableFooter · TableHead · TableRow · TableCell · TableCaption
- breadcrumb — Native nav. Components: Breadcrumb · BreadcrumbList · BreadcrumbItem · BreadcrumbLink · BreadcrumbPage · BreadcrumbSeparator · BreadcrumbEllipsis
- pagination — Native nav. Components: Pagination · PaginationContent · PaginationItem · PaginationLink (isActive prop) · PaginationPrevious · PaginationNext · PaginationEllipsis

### Blocks
- empty-state — Props: title (required) · description · icon · action · size ("sm" | "md" | "lg"). Exports EmptyStateIcons: inbox · search · folder · users
- login — LoginBlock props: onSubmit · onGoogleLogin · onGithubLogin · signUpHref · forgotPasswordHref · title · description · variant · size · animation · showSocial · successToast
- signup — SignupBlock props: onSubmit · onGoogleLogin · onGithubLogin · signInHref · termsHref · privacyHref · title · description · variant · size · animation · showSocial · successToast

## Theming

Uses CSS custom properties — same variable names as other registry-style systems.
All values are HSL channels without hsl() wrapper so Tailwind can apply opacity modifiers.

Required Tailwind v4 @theme block in globals.css:

```css
@theme {
  --color-background: hsl(var(--background));
  --color-foreground: hsl(var(--foreground));
  --color-primary: hsl(var(--primary));
  --color-primary-foreground: hsl(var(--primary-foreground));
  --color-secondary: hsl(var(--secondary));
  --color-secondary-foreground: hsl(var(--secondary-foreground));
  --color-muted: hsl(var(--muted));
  --color-muted-foreground: hsl(var(--muted-foreground));
  --color-accent: hsl(var(--accent));
  --color-accent-foreground: hsl(var(--accent-foreground));
  --color-destructive: hsl(var(--destructive));
  --color-destructive-foreground: hsl(var(--destructive-foreground));
  --color-border: hsl(var(--border));
  --color-input: hsl(var(--input));
  --color-ring: hsl(var(--ring));
  --color-card: hsl(var(--card));
  --color-card-foreground: hsl(var(--card-foreground));
  --color-popover: hsl(var(--popover));
  --color-popover-foreground: hsl(var(--popover-foreground));
}
```

## Data attributes used for styling

Base UI applies these to components — use them in Tailwind for state-based styling:

  data-[open]           — overlay/disclosure is open
  data-[closed]         — overlay/disclosure is closed (use for exit animations)
  data-[checked]        — checkbox/switch/radio is checked
  data-[unchecked]      — checkbox/switch/radio is unchecked
  data-[indeterminate]  — checkbox is indeterminate
  data-[disabled]       — component is disabled
  data-[selected]       — select item is selected
  data-[highlighted]    — list item is highlighted/focused
  data-[side=top|bottom|left|right] — floating element placement side

Example:
  className="data-[open]:opacity-100 data-[closed]:opacity-0 transition-opacity"

## Base UI Tailwind note

Base UI docs examples are written for Tailwind CSS v4.
If your project uses Tailwind v3, convert v4-specific syntax manually.
baseui-cn components are written for Tailwind v4.

## For AI agents — rules

1. ALWAYS use the render prop pattern on triggers and close buttons — never asChild
2. ALWAYS import from @/components/ui/<component-name>
3. Use cn() from @/lib/utils for conditional classNames
4. All overlays share one Base UI portal — no z-index wrappers or fixes needed when composing
5. Drawer side defaults to "right" — specify side="bottom" for mobile sheet pattern
6. ToastProvider wraps the entire app once (in layout.tsx) — do not nest multiple providers
7. TooltipProvider wraps groups of tooltips — one per page section is fine
8. Do NOT add Vaul, @radix-ui/*, cmdk, or any other UI primitive library
9. Do NOT use localStorage or sessionStorage inside components
10. Components are "use client" — they cannot be used as React Server Components directly.
    Wrap in a client boundary if needed inside a Server Component tree.

## Future primitives available in Base UI (not yet in baseui-cn registry)

These Base UI components exist and can be used directly if needed before registry wrappers exist:
Autocomplete · Avatar · Calendar · Collapsible · Context Menu · Field · Fieldset · Form
Menubar · Meter · Navigation Menu · Number Field · Preview Card · Progress
Scroll Area · Slider · Toggle · Toggle Group · Toolbar · Alert Dialog

Import directly from Base UI:
  import { Collapsible } from "@base-ui/react/collapsible"
  import { Field } from "@base-ui/react/field"

## Config file

```json
{
  "componentsPath": "src/components/ui",
  "utilsPath": "src/lib/utils",
  "globalCss": "src/app/globals.css",
  "tailwind": true,
  "rsc": true
}
```

## Registry URLs

Index:      https://raw.githubusercontent.com/baseui-cn/baseui-cn/main/packages/registry/index.json
Component:  https://raw.githubusercontent.com/baseui-cn/baseui-cn/main/packages/registry/registry/<name>.json
Docs:       https://baseui-cn.com
GitHub:     https://github.com/baseui-cn/baseui-cn
Base UI:    https://base-ui.com/llms.txt
